title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 22 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 22/11/2022
Image reference: 2022-11-22_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-22-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Capesize (Newcastlemax) China Steel Team and China Steel Entrepreneur (203,500 DWT, Dec 2006, Feb 2007, CSBC Kaohsiung) sold to Alberta Shipmanagement for USD 35.5 mil, VV Value USD 38.1 mil - En Bloc. Panamax Darya Lok (81,900 DWT, Jun 2012, Daewoo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 21.50 mil, VV Value USD 22.12 mil - SS Passed. Panamax LT Ocean Star (75,400 DWT, Jul 2005, Universal) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 14.00 mil, VV Value USD 13.62 mil - DD Passed.
